---
title: "lobster-report"
author: Harshmeet & Rafa
format: html
---

Data Citation: <https://portal.edirepository.org/nis/mapbrowse?packageid=knb-lter-sbc.77.8> This data was aquired April 20,2026

Abstract:

Owner Analysis: 

![Line and point plot showing lobster counts over time across different sites](figs/lobster_line_plot.png)
